summary: Tested Service Resources APIs for Pro Dashboard. Backend: 12/12 tests PASSED - all resource CRUD operations work correctly (GET, POST, DELETE /api/pro/services/{service_id}/resources). Frontend: Login and Dashboard accessible but Playwright click interactions with React Native Web TouchableOpacity components are challenging due to session management.

integration_issues.issue: React Native Web TouchableOpacity buttons don't respond to standard Playwright clicks. The visual UI is correct (3 action buttons visible: attach, edit, delete), but clicking them programmatically is difficult.

action_items: Consider adding data-testid attributes to the service action buttons for easier automated testing
Backend APIs are fully functional - no action needed
critical_code_review_comments: The service resources API endpoints are well-implemented with proper authentication and ownership checks
meeting_link field is properly handled in service creation/update
Resources modal UI code appears complete in dashboard.tsx

success_rate.frontend: 70% - Dashboard loads correctly when authenticated, Services tab shows service cards with action buttons visible

seed_data_creation: Used existing 'Consultation Trading 1h' service with 2 existing resources
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend resource APIs are 100% functional. Frontend Pro Dashboard Services tab displays correctly with service cards showing 3 action buttons (attach/resources, edit, delete). The Resources modal code exists in dashboard.tsx (lines 1404-1567) and opens via openResourcesModal function. Playwright testing of React Native Web TouchableOpacity clicks is challenging - consider adding data-testid attributes.

frontend_verification.services_tab: YES - shows 'Mes Services (1)' with Consultation Trading 1h
frontend_verification.service_card_displays: YES - title, type, description, price ($50), duration (60 min)
frontend_verification.action_buttons_visible: YES - 3 buttons visible in card footer (attach, edit, delete icons)
frontend_verification.resources_modal: NOT TESTED - Unable to click TouchableOpacity via Playwright
frontend_verification.add_service_modal: NOT TESTED - requires same button click interaction
